name: CHEESECAKE FACTORY INC
business: The Cheesecake Factory Incorporated operates full-service restaurants in the upscale casual dining segment under brands including The Cheesecake Factory, North Italia, Flower Child, and others, and also owns a bakery division that produces cheesecakes and baked goods for its restaurants, international licensees, and third-party customers.

exposures.sentence: The Cheesecake Factory Incorporated is a leader in experiential dining. We are culinary forward and relentlessly focused on hospitality. As of February 23, 2026, we owned and operated 368 restaurants throughout the United States and Canada under brands including The Cheesecake Factory (216 locations), North Italia (48 locations), Flower Child (43 locations) and additional brands within our Fox Restaurant Concepts ( Other FRC ) portfolio (55 locations).
In past years we have experienced and may again experience significant labor cost inflation, which has and may in the future significantly increase our cost of doing business.
Information technology system failures or breaches of our network security could interrupt our operations and subject us to increased operating costs, as well as to litigation and other liabilities.
New and current medical treatments such as GLP-1 agonists may shift consumer preferences.

catalysts.event: As many as 26 new restaurants to open across portfolio in fiscal 2026
catalysts.sentence: We expect to open as many as 26 new restaurants in fiscal 2026 across our portfolio of concepts, with approximately one third of the openings occurring in the first half of fiscal 2026.

catalysts.event: Approximate 1.5% menu price increase implementation in first quarter of fiscal 2026
catalysts.sentence: We are in the process of implementing an approximate 1.5% menu price increase in the first quarter of fiscal 2026.

tamClaims.claim: Approximately 300 domestic locations potential for The Cheesecake Factory
tamClaims.sentence: We continue to target approximately 300 Company-owned and operated The Cheesecake Factory restaurants domestically over time.

tamClaims.claim: Approximately 200 domestic locations potential for North Italia
tamClaims.sentence: we believe there is potential for approximately 200 domestic locations over time, which supports our plan for approximately 20% average annual unit growth.

tamClaims.claim: Approximately 700 domestic locations potential for Flower Child
tamClaims.sentence: we believe there is potential for approximately 700 domestic locations over time, which supports our plan for approximately 20% average annual unit growth for this concept.
